name: VTIL_ConnectSysVar
title: VTIL_ConnectSysVar
syntax: long VTIL_ConnectSysVar(dbNode workingSetMaster, dword objectId, char[] sysVarNameWithPath); // form 1
long VTIL_ConnectSysVar(dword addressWorkingSetMaster, dword objectId, char[] sysVarNameWithPath); // form 2
long VTIL_ConnectSysVar(dbNode vt, dbNode workingSetMaster, dword objectId, char[] sysVarNameWithPath); // form 3
long VTIL_ConnectSysVar(dbNode vt, dword addressWorkingSetMaster, dword objectId, char[] sysVarNameWithPath); // form 4
description: Connects an object from the object pool to a system variable. Valid objects are variables, objects representing values or string, buttons and soft keys.
If a variable object or an object representing a values or a string is changed, the new value is put into the system variable.
To release connection between the system variable and an object, just call the same method again, but with the empty string instead of the name of system variable.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: workingSetMaster
parameters.description: Working Set Master which provides the Object Pool

parameters.name: addressWorkingSetMaster
parameters.description: Address of the Working Set Master which provides the Object Pool

parameters.name: sysVarNameWithPath
parameters.description: Name of the system variable, all name spaces inclusive

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: Identifier of the object in the object pool

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
